title: Action Creation (M2M) — Process Flow
content:
start([START: M2M service sends
POST /api/v1/actions
with client_credentials JWT])

s1[1. Validate JWT
Verify Bearer token issued by NxGN Identity
Extract tenant_id from claims]

s2[2. Validate M2M scopes
Required scope: actions:write]

s3[3. Derive origin_system from client_id mapping
e.g., capstone-api → origin_system=capstone
e.g., pulse-api → origin_system=pulse]

s4[4. Execute same creation flow as PROC-1 steps 4–10
With additional field: origin_system = derived value]

s5[5. Optionally create source link
If request body includes source_link:
INSERT actions.action_source_links
action_id, origin_system, origin_entity_type,
origin_entity_id, origin_url]
s6[6. Return 201 Created with action DTO + ETag]
